<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-tiū]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[hak:Yet-chhiú]][[ja:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[nds:Holt-Oss]][[vi:Ất Sửu]][[za:Ietcouj]][[zh-min-nan:It-thiú]][[zh-yue:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]]

'''Yin Wood Ox also known as Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the second combination in the cycle, following [[Yang Wood Rat]] and preceding [[Yang Fire Tiger]]. According to the [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Kinoto (乙)]] represents [[Yin|yin]] [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents [[Yin|yin]] [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], creating a relationship of [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|conquest]] (Wood conquers Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: itchū
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu

==Years of Yin Wood Ox==
Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi'''
|-
! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[5]]
* [[65]]
* [[125]]
* [[185]]
* [[245]]
* [[305]]
* [[365]]
* [[425]]

* [[485]]
* [[545]]
* [[605]]
* [[665]]
* [[725]]
* [[785]]
* [[845]]
* [[905]]
* [[965]]
|
* [[1025]]
* [[1085]]
* [[1145]]
* [[1205]]
* [[1265]]
* [[1325]]
* [[1385]]
* [[1445]]
* [[1505]]
* [[1565]]
* [[1625]]
* [[1685]]
* [[1745]]
* [[1805]]
* [[1865]]
* [[1925]]
* [[1985]]
|
* [[2045]]
* 2105
* 2165
* 2225
* 2285
* 2345
* 2405
* 2465
* 2525
* [[2585]]
* [[2645]]
* [[2705]]
* [[2765]]
* [[2825]]
* [[2885]]
* 2945
|}

==Months of Yin Wood Ox==
The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or [[Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.

==Days of Yin Wood Ox==
=== Rekichū ===
Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the [[Japanese calendar]]:
* [[Rekichū Gedan]] – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months.
* [[Rekichū Gedan]] – applies to individuals whose [[natchin]] corresponds to the Wood element.
* [[Rekichū Gedan]] – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also ==
[[ceb:Wood Ox]]

{{wikidata link|Q599762}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
